description: A league administrator needs to generate the entire schedule for the upcoming season, balancing team travel and broadcast preferences.

nodes.task_description: Input all constraints into the scheduling software, including venue availability, team travel rules, and key broadcast dates.

expected_outcome.value: The software produces a complete, conflict-free draft schedule.

nodes.task_description: Send the draft schedule to teams and broadcast partners for review.

expected_outcome.value: Agent distributes the draft for feedback.

nodes.task_description: After making minor adjustments based on feedback, publish the final, official schedule.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finalizes and publishes the season schedule.
